en.description_en: This is a tangible cultural property in the crafts category, an umbrella-shaped stone lantern. It is town-designated by Iwaizumi Town and was designated on 8 July 1978. It is located in Iwaizumi Town.

This is a tangible cultural property in the calligraphy and books category, a set of Buddhist scriptures in six hundred volumes. It is town-designated by Iwaizumi Town and was designated on 8 July 1978. It is located in Iwaizumi Town.
This is a tangible cultural property in the crafts category, a ship chest (funa-tansu). It is town-designated by Iwaizumi Town and was designated on 31 March 1980. It is located in Iwaizumi Town.

This is a tangible cultural property in the sculpture category, a carving of a heavenly maiden with the rising sun. It is town-designated by Iwaizumi Town and was designated on 31 March 1980. It is located in Iwaizumi Town.

This is a tangible cultural property in the historical materials category, a secret treatise on ironmaking. It is town-designated by Iwaizumi Town and was designated on 31 March 1980. It is located in Iwaizumi Town.

This is a tangible cultural property in the archaeological materials category, a goggle-eyed (shakoki) clay figurine. It is town-designated by Iwaizumi Town and was designated on 1 April 1992. It is located in Iwaizumi Town.

en.name_en: Materials Relating to Shunsaku of Akka Village
en.description_en: This is a tangible cultural property in the historical materials category, materials relating to Shunsaku of Akka Village. It is town-designated by Iwaizumi Town and was designated on 1 December 1994. It is located in Iwaizumi Town.
This is an intangible cultural property, the craft of shikon (purple-root) dyeing. It is town-designated by Iwaizumi Town and was designated on 1 April 1992. It is located in Iwaizumi Town.
